title: Aim-preview — persistent trajectory dotted line
hypothesis: Showing the parabolic arc before the user touches the screen lifts mechanic clarity and reduces fail-shots in the first 5s
diff_from_baseline: scene_interior/aim.js: drawAimOverlay now renders an idle preview arc (62°, power 0.7, pulsing alpha) when the player isn't dragging
review_notes: Axis respected (only aim render touched, not input). Active-drag preview unchanged. Visible in thumb at INTERIOR_AIM.
